title: Add page fields support to pivot tables
author: protobi-pieter
body:
Currently pivot tables support rows, columns, and values, but not page fields (report filters).

Page fields allow filtering the entire pivot table by a field value. For example, a "latest" field with values 0/1 could default to showing only latest=1 rows, with option to select latest=0 or all values via dropdown.

This would require:
- Add `pages` array to pivot table model (lib/doc/pivot-table.js)
- Generate `<pageFields>` XML in pivot-table-xform.js
- Support for default selected item per page field

Example usage:
```javascript
pivotSheet.addPivotTable({
  sourceSheet: dataSheet,
  rows: ['Region', 'Product'],
  columns: ['Quarter'],
  values: ['Sales'],
  pages: ['latest'],  // new property
  pageDefaults: { latest: 1 },  // optional: default filter value
  metric: 'sum'
});
```
